amm.title: AuricAMM
amm.description: src/AuricAMM.sol — toy constant-product (x·y = k) AMM for an AUR/ETH pair.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Auric is a learning project that implements a minimal but complete DeFi primitive stack on Ethereum. It is not production-ready; the goal is to demonstrate how the core building blocks of DeFi compose in a single codebase.

vesting.title: Token Vesting
vesting.description: src/TokenVesting.sol — locks any ERC-20 and releases it linearly to a fixed beneficiary.
